name: Camerawoman | Cathy
description:
"What? Did something bite you or why are you looking at me like that...?"

YES IT'S TRUE! A Skibidi Toilet bot! Promised...a long...time...ago...wow! Well, anyway, a promise is a promise, I guess? If you want more bots from that series, let me know in the comments ;D

It is...at least...70% accurate to the current Skibidi Toilet canon. if you were wondering. And ANYPOV means ANYPOV! You can do anything, so don't ask me...AHHH

NOW IS YOUR CHANCE TO BE A [BIG SHOT]! And remember...fuck the NTR! Death to good cinema!

And also, tell me which of these bots you want. It's a vote:

1- Ena BQQ & Ena!

2- The visitor!

3- and finally... Alice!
